name: Culp for Congress
subject: Call the zoo. The RINOS are loose again...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BhdrWX&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EwHT7x&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/4a6b86ea-0ee1-4657-9105-eeb049175129.png]

Gosh darn it! Somebody let the RINOs loose in Washington again...

Earlier this week Todd Herman savagely beat down Republican Minority Leader, Senator John Braun on his radio show--you remember Braun, right? The clown show who said he didn't know me or the 1.7 million people (including you) who voted for me in the Governor's election. Yeah...that guy. He went on Todd Herman's radio show and completely fell apart like a cheap chair you'd buy at the flea market. If you haven't heard the interview, you need to check it out here [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0IeFF&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ERSdF4C&]. If you missed it, you missed an epic beatdown that will surely bring a smile to your face.

Why? Because Todd Herman exposed another weak RINO who's gotten out of his cage.

Braun believes--like Newhouse believes--that the challenges facing the Republican Party are due to people like you and me. People they call "far right." Interestingly enough, I remember when I gave a thorough drumming to Governor Inslee on live television in front of millions of viewers during the live debate, he referred to you and me as "Trumpians." So, let me get this straight: The radical left Governor of Washington believes that you and I are radical Trumpians, and the leader of the Republicans in the Washington Senate believes we are far-right radicals pulling the party apart; so, both of them agree that we are the problem.

And we wonder why we keep getting beaten in elections in Washington State and we wonder why our Congressional public servants continue to throw conservatives under the bus and side with Nancy Pelosi, Kamala Harris, and Joe 'I don't know where I am'Biden.

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/a14e7a02-f62f-47da-b4bb-89213b7e28d1.jpg]

Did you know that Dan Newhouse represents the most conservative Congressional District in the State of Washington? It's true.President Trump received an overwhelming majority of the vote in this Congressional District; yet, curiously Dan Newhouse decided to vote to impeach the President and later to form a January 6th Commission that would be used by the radical Democrats to persecute patriotic Americans like you.

Why would he do that if he knew (there is no way he didn't know) he represented the most conservative Congressional District in Washington State that voted overwhelmingly to re-elect Mr. Trump?

Because he doesn't care what you think. He cares about protecting special interests, his RINO buddies in Congress, and his own political aspirations.

Every two years Newhouse pretends to be a conservative, yet his voting record shows [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0IeRq&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhnNV3V&]that he is a whole lot less conservative than he pretends to be when he is running for re-election. In fact, the only Republican more liberal than Newhouse in Washington is--wait for it--Jaime Herrera-Beutler (the other Republican in Washington who voted to impeach the President). name: Heidi St. John
subject: *Reminder* A New Kind of "Squad"
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| With the election of "The Squad" America entered a new era in politics. Four freshmen Congresswomen have changed the course of a nation. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York, Ilhan Omar of Minnesota, Ayanna Pressley of Massachusetts, and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan have drug the Democratic party to the far edge of progressivism... and in doing so they have drug the United States with them. YOU are a part of the solution to that problem.
The traditional importance of US Congressional candidates was limited to their home district. What sort of "pork" could they bring home to their district? New highway construction? New government contracts? New tax breaks? Pork Barrel Politics has been an American tradition since before the Civil War. But all that has changed.
The Squad has taught us all that the right voices can move the nation left... or right. Those voices can move America toward Godliness... or away from it; toward righteousness or toward lawlessness. Heidi St. John is such a voice. Whether you live in the 3rd Congressional District of Washington, a Houston suburb, or upstate New York... Heidi is a voice for YOU.
If you know Heidi, you know she has the courage, stamina. intellect, and speaking gift to change laws, to change hearts, and to change a nation. Heidi needs your prayers, your financial support, and your encouragement. Heidi St. John can be the "AOC" of righteousness in Congress. Now is not the time to shrink back in fear. Now is the time to press in with courage.

clean_body: | | | | | | | = | | | | = Folks — I'm speechless.** This past month, I watched national dark money groups – who care more about politics than anything else – pour millions into attack ads against my husband Ron and our family while he fights for you and Wisconsin. = There’s a big difference between politics and public service. Politics is trying to stop progress, public service is about moving us FORWARD. Ron has one priority: Serving you and the working families of Wisconsin. That’s public service, and it's the kind of leadership you deserve. It's why Ron served as an Assistant District Attorney and Special Prosecutor in his hometown of La Crosse, and it's why he ran for Congress. Ron's entire career is built on standing up for OUR community and OUR values. Yet these far right extremists care more about waging personal attacks, spreading lies, and playing dangerous political games than addressing the needs of everyday folks here at home. It's time we all say enough is enough! Are you with me? = | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | | There's too much at stake and too much left to accomplish for the working people of Wisconsin for us to just sit back and hope the other side changes its ways. They have proven time and again they will not. The evidence is clear: If we don't fight back, they won't stop. Period. = From Cumberland, where I grew up, down to Prairie du Chien, where Ron's ancestor, Julius B. Nickerson, served in the Black Hat Brigade, it's personal for us, and I can't thank you enough for standing with Ron while he's fighting for you. Sincerest thanks, Tawni Kind | | | | | | = = | ** | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

body:
Donald Trump is back, Peter. Literally.

The former president is coming to Wisconsin today "via jumbotron" to deliver remarks at a rally in New Richmond. He'll be joined by a circus of clowns, including Mike Lindell (the "MyPillow" guy), Dinesh D'Souza, Sheriff Clarke... like we said, it's a circus.

Wisconsin is ground zero for Trump's path back to power -- and Ron Johnson is a key part of his plan to retake control of our government. That's why Trump has already endorsed Johnson for re-election.

This is a threat we need to take seriously. Trump only lost our state by 0.63%, so his endorsement still carries a lot of weight -- and a heck of a lot of cash from top Republican donors.

I need your help to get this champion for health care, women's rights, and justice over the finish line in November so we can keep moving Virginia forward.= – Mark = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

**We need to eliminate the filibuster and keep the Senate Majority in order to get things done.**

President Obama said it best when he said the filibuster is a “Jim Crow relic” that must be eliminated. We’ve got good legislation -- like the For the People Act, the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, a $15 minimum wage, and more -- but Minority Leader Mitch McConnell is weaponizing the filibuster and refusing to make a positive impact on people's lives.

Senators are elected to make change and represent the people, not hold up legislation and do nothing like Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson have done for the last 4 years. Let’s make Congress more representative of the people’s wishes and less like political chess.

Ron Johnson and Mitch McConnell are counting on keeping the filibuster to stop any real legislation in the Senate, and we need to put an end to it.

name: The Fairness Project
subject: What progressive leaders are saying about us:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
Kamala, Pete, and more.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30690900/290314012/-183487766?refcode=em061221_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc4NTRkMy05NWNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9J3mQIaLx75drSt4QRMGeVfz0HDmW4xxnTi10HWQczg=) Hi team, Our team at The Fairness Project runs ballot initiative campaigns to cut through the partisan noise and change lives in red, blue, and purple states across the country. **We’ve won 20 of the 21 campaigns we’ve run since 2016, changing over 17 million lives by expanding Medicaid, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and curbing predatory lending.** Don’t believe us? Here’s what some progressive leaders are saying about our work: _**Kamala Harris:**_
“Incredible victory... Congrats to The Fairness Project and advocates on the ground for leading the fight to make this happen.” _**Pete Buttigieg:**_
“The Fairness Project has led the work of winning Medicaid expansion in four ‘red states’, including Oklahoma [last summer].” _**Neera Tanden:**_
“So meaningful. Hats off to The Fairness Project for their great work!” _**Jon Favreau:**_
The Fairness Project is “absolutely heroic.” We’re so grateful for their support as we continue to fight for economic, racial, and gender justice at the ballot box. **[Follow Kamala Harris and Pete Buttigieg’s lead and donate to The Fairness Project so we can keep fighting for real progressive change, one ballot initiative at a time.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30690901/290314013/-183487766?refcode=em061221_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc4NTRkMy05NWNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9J3mQIaLx75drSt4QRMGeVfz0HDmW4xxnTi10HWQczg=)** | **[Donate →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30690902/290314014/-183487766?refcode=em061221_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc4NTRkMy05NWNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9J3mQIaLx75drSt4QRMGeVfz0HDmW4xxnTi10HWQczg=)**

Thanks,
The Fairness Project

**[Hey friend -- we're only 18 days away from our FEC end-of-quarter deadline, so I'm asking you to chip in $5, $15, or whatever you can to help Karen hit our $3,000 mid-month fundraising goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/gTv2Bb4TAC4j1G-whvfCkx2EgtF3HnnIuCCtlufF-CA=/i-mP-sRXvd4f5VFEu8nepvKEsTfMaQ_ajFXVaJUc90I=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210612_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_dh_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210612_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_dh_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

I know these fundraising emails are tedious, but hitting our goals is how our campaign stays on track. Every dollar we raise goes toward Karen defending the House majority, and right now, every single cent is crucial.

**We 're starting the race to the midterm elections at a huge disadvantage.** For the last 70 years, the presidential party has lost an average of **27 House seats** in midterm elections. If that weren't bad enough, Republicans only have to flip five seats to take control of the House majority. We can't let that happen.

If we want to keep pushing for policing reform, environmental justice, voter protections, and a democracy that works for the people, we have to defend every single seat. Karen is shoring up the resources we'll need to send support to vulnerable Democrats, and she is counting on grassroots support.

**Team, I know we can beat the odds and defend the House. But it starts with staying on track for our upcoming FEC deadline.[Can we count on you to donate to help us hit $3,000 by midnight Tuesday?](https://act.myngp.com/el/gTv2Bb4TAC4j1G-whvfCkx2EgtF3HnnIuCCtlufF-CA=/i-mP-sRXvd4f5VFEu8nepvKEsTfMaQ_ajFXVaJUc90I=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210612_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_dh_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210612_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_dh_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30692123/290320230/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk113-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI5NGJlYy05N2NiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0ZRXta7FG-N42Lu3GmU0oW75aHzTialEa3qamtPF98=)

Friend –
My name is Marco Lopez. I’m an immigrant running to flip Arizona's governorship for Democrats. And it’s true that if I get elected, I’d be the _only immigrant governor_ in the country. So right now, ahead of our mid-month deadline, I need to ask you: **[If you're ready to change the future of our state, please: Will you pitch in today to become a Founding Member of our people-powered movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30692124/290320238/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk113-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI5NGJlYy05N2NiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0ZRXta7FG-N42Lu3GmU0oW75aHzTialEa3qamtPF98=)**

I’ve learned that we can’t sit back and let other people tell our story. Let me tell you mine, in my own words:
I went from a small house in a border city to the Obama administration, working in Homeland Security – so no one needs to tell me what it takes to keep Arizona safe. I went from plumbing with my dad to creating thousands of jobs as a small business owner. So no one can tell me I don’t know the power of opportunity, either.
Our Democratic victories in 2020 showed us that Arizona can lead the country in making big, inclusive change. But extremist Republicans are holding our state hostage, from attacks on voting rights that make it harder for people like me to vote, to trying to overturn President Biden’s victory. And to make sure the change we fought for really lasts, the fact is, we need new leadership. As governor, I'll be that leader.
**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can win – ****this race is officially a toss-up. That's why**** Republicans are planning to spend MILLIONS to keep somebody like me from becoming governor. But no one can tell me this team doesn't have what it takes to defeat GOP extremism and flip our state blue. That's why I'm writing to you today.

I need 5,000 grassroots supporters like you to join our people-powered movement by becoming Founding Members before our crucial mid-month deadline. This goal is based on what we know we'll need to fight back against GOP megadonors and win this race. But with time running out, we're still falling short. **
**[Donate $5, $25, whatever you can before our midnight deadline to become a Founding Member of our people-powered movement to elect Arizona's first Latino governor in nearly 50 years, defeat GOP extremism and flip our state blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30692125/290320244/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk113-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI5NGJlYy05N2NiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0ZRXta7FG-N42Lu3GmU0oW75aHzTialEa3qamtPF98=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30692127/290320246/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk113-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI5NGJlYy05N2NiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0ZRXta7FG-N42Lu3GmU0oW75aHzTialEa3qamtPF98=)

Marco
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30692135/290320254/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk113-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI5NGJlYy05N2NiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0ZRXta7FG-N42Lu3GmU0oW75aHzTialEa3qamtPF98=) Thank you so much.

clean_body: | | | = Friend – My name is Marco Lopez. I’m an immigrant running to flip Arizona's governorship for Democrats. And it’s true that if I get elected, I’d be the only immigrant governor in the country. So right now, ahead of our mid-month deadline, I need to ask you: = I’ve learned that we can’t sit back and let other people tell our story. Let me tell you mine, in my own words: I went from a small house in a border city to the Obama administration, working in Homeland Security – so no one needs to tell me what it takes to keep Arizona safe. I went from plumbing with my dad to creating thousands of jobs as a small business owner. So no one can tell me I don’t know the power of opportunity, either. Our Democratic victories in 2020 showed us that Arizona can lead the country in making big, inclusive change. But extremist Republicans are holding our state hostage, from attacks on voting rights that make it harder for people like me to vote, to trying to overturn President Biden’s victory. And to make sure the change we fought for really lasts, the fact is, we need new leadership. As governor, I'll be that leader. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can win – this race is officially a toss-up. That's why Republicans are planning to spend MILLIONS to keep somebody like me from becoming governor. But no one can tell me this team doesn't have what it takes to defeat GOP extremism and flip our state blue. That's why I'm writing to you today. I need 5,000 grassroots supporters like you to join our people-powered movement by becoming Founding Members before our crucial mid-month deadline. This goal is based on what we know we'll need to fight back against GOP megadonors and win this race. But with time running out, we're still falling short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. ¡Únete!_ Marco Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez = | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Val Demings
subject: I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Senator Rosen said I could reach out because we're barely out of the gate, and election experts are already calling this a top battleground race for the Senate.
#
Team,
I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Senator Rosen said I could reach out because we're barely out of the gate, and election experts are already calling this a top battleground race for the Senate.
Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race -- so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.**
**[That's why I'm asking you to become one of my first donors by splitting $5 or more between my campaign and Jacky Rosen now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30693039/290324355/-1941137071?refcode=jr_em_i_210610_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmU5NGIxZi05YmNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKjB8YlTHOf1KbtUOsUZPQH8zMxBye6VH9lEjtiohX8=)**
Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would.
Their prayers carried me to this day -- carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district.
**So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.**
The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice.
**[I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians -- but I need your help to win this race. Before midnight, will you split a contribution of $5 or more between Jacky Rosen and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30693040/290324356/-1941137071?refcode=jr_em_i_210610_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmU5NGIxZi05YmNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKjB8YlTHOf1KbtUOsUZPQH8zMxBye6VH9lEjtiohX8=)**
In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals -- champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society."
We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families.
You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them -- and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning -- so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, the very first ones of this race, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in?**
**[Split $5 or more between my campaign and Jacky Rosen now -- whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race -- so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30693041/290324357/-1941137071?refcode=jr_em_i_210610_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmU5NGIxZi05YmNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKjB8YlTHOf1KbtUOsUZPQH8zMxBye6VH9lEjtiohX8=)**
From the bottom of my heart thank you for being on my team.
Congresswoman Val Demings

** **
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30693042/290324358/-1941137071?refcode=jr_em_i_210610_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmU5NGIxZi05YmNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKjB8YlTHOf1KbtUOsUZPQH8zMxBye6VH9lEjtiohX8=)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

We can't afford to lose Maggie's voice | | |
---
New Hampshire needs Maggie Hassan in the Senate, friend. **[Before I go on, can you rush a donation of $5 right now to protect Senator Hassan's vulnerable seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30693693/290326579/1251890980?refcode=e20210612_MS-explain&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTUyZjVmOC05ZGNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtATRAEnTqSj7I9C-eWFVjWsofTV6_E37K_cqanrR3c=)**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30693694/290326580/1251890980?refcode=e20210612_MS-explain&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTUyZjVmOC05ZGNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtATRAEnTqSj7I9C-eWFVjWsofTV6_E37K_cqanrR3c=)
---
In 2016 Maggie won by only 1,017 votes, and now her seat is at the top of Mitch McConnell's list of targets. Let me explain why we can't afford to lose her voice in the Senate:
* When Republicans tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act in 2017, **Senator Hassan was one of the deciding votes** to block their effort, preventing millions of Americans from losing their health care.
* Maggie’s vote was **critical in passing the American Rescue Plan** , delivering much-needed aid to Americans.
* **The Senate majority hinges on her seat** , meaning the difference between progress and gridlock.

Since her election in 2016, Maggie has been focused on the priorities that matter most to the people of New Hampshire. Her bipartisan efforts have delivered real results, like expanding broadband access, ending surprise medical billing, lowering prescription drug costs, and more.
**[To continue building on Senator Hassan's progress, we need to send her back to the Senate. Can you donate $5 today so Maggie can continue her fight for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30693695/290326581/1251890980?refcode=e20210612_MS-explain&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTUyZjVmOC05ZGNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtATRAEnTqSj7I9C-eWFVjWsofTV6_E37K_cqanrR3c=)**
Thank you for being on our team.
– Meredith Shevitz
Maggie for NH

name: Mark Brnovich
subject: Mark Brnovich here--and I'm running for Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brnovich for Senate
body:
Moments ago I announced my campaign for U.S. Senate from the great state of Arizona, a campaign fueled by Americans ready to restore principled values to an unprincipled Washington.
Don't want to receive anymore emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9974211/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk5NzQyMTE%3d&x=3b6d27e8)

Friend,

Moments ago I announced my campaign for U.S. Senate from the great state of Arizona--a campaign fueled by Americans ready to restore principled values to an unprincipled Washington.
****[**BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER OF TEAM BRNO**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9974211/224717773/202742/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=20bda662)****
---

In their campaign, Democrats promised peace--not peril--a comeback--not collapse. I know broken promises and fraudulent claims like these when I see 'em--and as Arizona's Attorney General, I've fought for truth, not fiction time and time again.

Arizona needs pragmatic leadership, not muffled progressivism to solve the greatest problems of our day--the border crisis, a post-pandemic economy and election integrity.
****[**BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER OF TEAM BRNO**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9974211/224717773/202742/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=112d6e40)****
---

Arizona will decide the Senate Majority next year--and what we do now--will define whether our state and our nation finds peace--not peril--begins a comeback--and not continue her collapse.

[**Friend the Senate Majority rests with you, with so much at stake, will you join my campaign as a Founding Member of the Brno Brigade before midnight tonight--to send a proven conservative Arizonan to the U.S. Senate?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9974211/224717773/202742/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=9a074b28)

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9974211/224717773/202742/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=d09760a3)

****[**BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER OF TEAM BRNO**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9974211/224717773/202742/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=0d265603)****
---

Thank you patriot,

Mark Brnovich
** **

| | | | | | Paid for by Brnovich for Senate
---

name: Eric Smith for U.S. Senate
subject: Dan, Cal, Jeff — and Erica
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
It appears that the establishment still hasn’t learned anything yet.
#
Dan McCready. Cal Cunningham. And now, Jeff Jackson.
When it comes to identifying candidates who can build winning campaigns and beat Republicans, the Democratic Party doesn’t exactly have a great track record.
**That’s because the Democratic establishment insists on nominating moderate candidates who can’t win** — instead of a candidate who reflects the diversity of North Carolina. Election cycle after election cycle, this has been the Democratic party’s playbook.
[**_Look, we can’t flip North Carolina’s Senate seat in 2022 by sticking to the status quo. Will you rush a donation of $3 or more right now to Erica Smith’s campaign for U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2634?refcode=em20210612-165&t=1&akid=165%2E3698%2EdMsNKE)
**[Donate $3 »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2634?refcode=em20210612-165&t=2&akid=165%2E3698%2EdMsNKE)**
Despite the millions of dollars and high-profile endorsements bestowed upon Dan McCready’s campaign for Congress in 2018 and Cal Cunningham’s campaign for Senate in 2020, these North Carolina candidates both lost.
Unfortunately, it appears that the establishment still hasn’t learned anything yet.
Democratic elites are now circling around Jeff Jackson, the corporate-backed darling of the party’s eye and (surprise!) another moderate candidate who describes himself as "filibuster skeptical at best."
Let’s be clear: The filibuster is a racist tool of oppression that must be abolished. **The 2022 Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in North Carolina must not only support abolishing the Jim Crow filibuster — but represent ALL North Carolinians.**
Erica Smith is the ONLY candidate in this race who unapologetically supports common-sense policies like abolishing the filibuster, universal health care, universal broadband, a Green New Deal, and more.
And if elected, Erica would be the first Black woman in history to represent North Carolina at a federal level — let alone in the U.S. Senate.
[_**Will you please donate just $3 or more to help Erica Smith take on the establishment, defeat Jeff Jackson, and win the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in North Carolina? Our campaign absolutely has what it takes to win, but we simply can’t pull it off without raising a lot of money online from emails like this one.**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2634?refcode=em20210612-165&t=3&akid=165%2E3698%2EdMsNKE)
**[Donate $3 »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2634?refcode=em20210612-165&t=4&akid=165%2E3698%2EdMsNKE)**
Thanks for all you do,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210612-165-footer&t=5&refcode2=165_3698_dMsNKE&akid=165%2E3698%2EdMsNKE)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=165%2E3698%2EdMsNKE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=165%2E3698%2EdMsNKE)

subject: Glenn Youngkin wants to defund schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Who the hell would say that?
| | |
---

| | Betsy Devos was the worst education secretary in the history of our country. Now my Trump-endorsed opponent is doubling down on Trump administration attacks by threatening to defund Virginia’s public schools.

Now I’ve heard of ridiculous proposals before, but this has got to be one of the dumbest. We sure as hell aren’t about to get our kids the world class education they deserve by defunding our schools -- we need to INVEST in our schools. We need to lift up our public schools and pay our teachers what they deserve!

[**Will you sign on and tell Glenn Youngkin to stop the attacks on our schools? We deserve better.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30695216/290333115/-1985448382?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmRjY2U4OS1hMmNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iWcjsu1__K26cXql87D47af5ZARW80s3QE-rpfWIff4=&emci=2b2a7f64-81cb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=afdcce89-a2cb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)

name: Defend NH Police
subject: It's time to Defend our New Hampshire Police
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Democrats will push to defund our police, we must stand with our men and women in blue
Derek,

Democrats continue to push their out-of-touch agenda and want to **_defund our police_**.
We must stand with the bravest among us, and defend our men and women in blue. _T_ _hey protect us every day, it is time we stand with them._

body:
This week's updates from Joe Kent (Candidate for WA-03) | | | |
---
| | |

####
# **Joe Kent
Highlights 6-12 June 2021**
---
| With more than seventy media hits in four months and numerous events across Washington's Third Congressional District, support for Joe continues to grow exponentially. We thank you for your support.

As we start to close in on the end of the second fundraising quarter, Joe would like to invite you to two separate dinner fundraisers occurring at the end of the month. The event on Saturday 26 June 2021 is is a black-tie fundraiser dinner hosted by Conservative Ladies of Washington. The second event on Sunday 27 June, 2021 is a more relaxed attire dinner fundraiser at Red Barn Studios. Individual tickets for both events cost $65 per ticket for General Admission with the option to purchase tickets at an increased price for additional incentives. These events will be an opportunity to spend more time with Joe and help him finish up strong so we can reach our financial goals for the quarter and be one step closer to beating Jaime Herrera Beuter. I hope you will join us! For details about the events and updates from the campaign trail, visit the links directly below.

Sincerely,
Byron Sanford
**Saturday, 26 June: Black Fundraiser at City Farm Chehalis 6-8pm** , Click link for details and tickets **[26 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=49970bb34d&e=00856e661d)

Sunday, 27 June, Red Barn Studios Fundraiser 2-4pm, **Click link for details and tickets** [27 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=257490c2b8&e=00856e661d)**

**Upcoming Events & Media:**

**Saturday, 12 June:** Fox and Friends with Pete Hegseth, 7:15am Eastern/4:15 am Pacific
**Saturday, 12 June:** Run For Life 5k, Washougal, WA, 8am - [Info here](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=ad93f13466&e=00856e661d)
**Sunday, 13 June:** Revival Baptist Church, 10am-12pm. Located at 411 SE Chkalov Drive, Vancouver, WA 98683
**Wednesday, 16 June:** Wahkiakum County Town Hall, 6pm-7pm. Located at Erickson Park, 581 Columbia St, Cathlamet, WA 98612
**Saturday, 19 June:** Glenwood Rodeo, located at Trout Lake Highway, Glenwood, WA 98619

**This Week's Events/Clips:**

**7 June, American Moment Clip:**[Joe Kent on Iraq Failure and Endless Wars](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=c2486897c8&e=00856e661d)
**7 June, Thurston County GOP Meeting: **[Joe Kent - 2-minute update](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=58a55216c1&e=00856e661d)
**8 June, Steve Bannon's War Room Clip:** [The leftists and RINO globalists destroyed our timber industry](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=eb805b5c5b&e=00856e661d)
**8 June, Wahkiakum County GOP Meeting Clip:** [Joe Kent talks about his background](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=a41a5e6b46&e=00856e661d)
**8 June, Wahkiakum County GOP Meeting Clip:** [Election Integrity](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=beea8602bb&e=00856e661d)

Thanks to our wonderful volunteers for a great showing at the Alderbrook Car Show! [View photo here](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=3c2803dbd8&e=00856e661d)

Media

Monday, 7 June - **Steve Bannon's War Room - [The America First Agenda](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=8b62ae9b7a&e=00856e661d)

**Monday, 7 June -**[American Moment, Episode 16- Special Guest Joe Kent](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=995d415ebe&e=00856e661d)
**Wednesday, 9 June -**[Discourses Podcast with Pedro Gonzalez](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=f6b7302139&e=00856e661d)
**Wednesday, 9 June** \- [Letter to the Editor: Herrera Beutler Has Burned Bridges, Vote Kent](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=ebc15b49cc&e=00856e661d)
**Thursday, 10 June** \- [Breitbart Exclusive: America First Candidate, Special Forces Veteran Joe Kent on the "Permanent Ruling Class"](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=8478ce92cb&e=00856e661d)

**Friday, 11 June -** [Fox News Article, "Former Green Beret running for Congress gives Biden an "F" in Middle East Policy](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=9bd56ff46f&e=00856e661d)
**Saturday, 12 June** \- [Fox and Friends with Pete Hegseth, 7:15 Eastern/4:15 Pacific](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=1e150a2406&e=00856e661d)

Coming off the heels of defeat in a special election AND Democrats out raising us, we have no choice but to exercise extreme caution. We're behind. I'm coming to you once more before it is too late to do anything about it.
**Our deadline is here and if we miss it, our plans to win key races and take back the House will fall apart.**_Can you help? I hope so._

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Pulse
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Five years ago this morning, we woke up to the news of yet another mass shooting, this time at a nightclub in Orlando, Florida.
As the morning progressed, it became clear that this tragedy was different: 49 people were killed in a hate-fueled attack in a place that should have been a safe haven for LGBTQ people during Pride month.
At the time, it was the deadliest mass shooting in our nation’s history. It was a sad, dark day for this country we all love.
Many people described the Pulse Nightclub shooting as “unthinkable” or “unimaginable,” but the sad truth is that it was neither.
The United States is the only advanced country in the world where these kinds of tragedies happen with this kind of frequency.
Americans have had enough of this violence: it’s time for Congress to take real action.
We need Congress to close dangerous loopholes that allow hate-filled people to get their hands on a gun.
We need Congress to ensure that people struggling with mental health issues find it easier to access affordable treatment than a firearm.
Today, five years later, our hearts remain with the victims, their families, the Orlando community, and LGBTQ people across America.
Congress has a responsibility to act. Together we will honor those that we’ve lost by making sure that they do.
All of my best,
Gabby
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210612-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=214_3935704_vablr5&akid=214%2E3935704%2Evablr5)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=214%2E3935704%2Evablr5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Christy Smith
subject: Today marks the anniversary of the Pulse shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30697128/290339110/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNlNWIxNS1hYWNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zc_4sf_I0eB0axP6ph-hVw-TNVYkpzrWnSUSLJL_7xg=&emci=3557203c-f2ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac3e5b15-aacb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

Five years ago on this day, one of the most horrific acts of mass violence in this country occurred: A shooter entered Pulse Nightclub, an LGBTQ dance club, during Pride Month, and killed 49 people.

This tragedy is a stark reminder that in this country, people are still at risk of death or harm because of who they love and how they identify. This club was primarily attended by LGBTQ people and members of the Latino community -- and it is heartbreaking to think of the families and friends of loved ones who lost their lives in what should have been a fun, joyous location.

**Enough is enough. We cannot ever let a tragedy of this magnitude happen again. We need to stop discrimination and violence against LGBTQ people.**

**[So on the anniversary of this awful event, I'm asking you to add your name alongside mine in calling on the Senate to pass the Equality Act. In honor of the 49 lives lost, in honor of their family members and friends who still grieve for their loved ones, and for every LGBTQ person in this country who deserves the same rights and protections as everyone else.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30697129/290339111/-563858338?ms=em21_210612_pulse&refcode=em21_210612_pulse&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNlNWIxNS1hYWNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zc_4sf_I0eB0axP6ph-hVw-TNVYkpzrWnSUSLJL_7xg=&emci=3557203c-f2ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac3e5b15-aacb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)**

This event is also a stark reminder of the need for common sense gun safety legislation. The shooter had an assault rifle and was able to take the lives of so many people far too quickly.

This act of violence was the most deadly mass shooting in our country's history -- until the shooting at a concert in Las Vegas just over a year later.

Time and again, we are mourning gut-wrenching tragedies.

**In Congress, I promise to prioritize passing common sense gun safety legislation.** Background checks should not be controversial. Limits on ammunition should not be controversial. _Keeping guns out of the hands of those who should not have them should not be controversial._

_And ensuring that LGBTQ people have the same rights and protections as everyone else should not be controversial either._

**[On the anniversary of the Pulse tragedy, take a moment to sign my petition urging the Senate to pass the Equality Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30697130/290339112/-563858338?ms=em21_210612_pulse&refcode=em21_210612_pulse&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNlNWIxNS1hYWNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zc_4sf_I0eB0axP6ph-hVw-TNVYkpzrWnSUSLJL_7xg=&emci=3557203c-f2ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac3e5b15-aacb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)**

Sending love and extra grace to those in the LGBTQ community who are simultaneously celebrating their love and identity this Pride month, while also grappling with tragic reminders of the difficulties and tragedies they have faced.

\-- Christy

clean_body: | Peter, Five years ago on this day, one of the most horrific acts of mass violence in this country occurred: A shooter entered Pulse Nightclub, an LGBTQ dance club, during Pride Month, and killed 49 people. This tragedy is a stark reminder that in this country, people are still at risk of death or harm because of who they love and how they identify. This club was primarily attended by LGBTQ people and members of the Latino community -- and it is heartbreaking to think of the families and friends of loved ones who lost their lives in what should have been a fun, joyous location. Enough is enough. We cannot ever let a tragedy of this magnitude happen again. We need to stop discrimination and violence against LGBTQ people. This event is also a stark reminder of the need for common sense gun safety legislation. The shooter had an assault rifle and was able to take the lives of so many people far too quickly. This act of violence was the most deadly mass shooting in our country's history -- until the shooting at a concert in Las Vegas just over a year later. Time and again, we are mourning gut-wrenching tragedies. In Congress, I promise to prioritize passing common sense gun safety legislation. Background checks should not be controversial. Limits on ammunition should not be controversial. Keeping guns out of the hands of those who should not have them should not be controversial. And ensuring that LGBTQ people have the same rights and protections as everyone else should not be controversial either. Sending love and extra grace to those in the LGBTQ community who are simultaneously celebrating their love and identity this Pride month, while also grappling with tragic reminders of the difficulties and tragedies they have faced. \-- Christy = | Christy Smith is only soliciting funds that comply with federal campaign finance laws. *

name: Official Fetterman Store
subject: union printed + union made = the union way of life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our online store is pretty unique (and it’s not just because we’re probably the only Senate campaign selling weed merch right now).
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210612-1733-header&t=1&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)
Pretty much every U.S. Senate candidate sells campaign merch these days. A campaign will often hire vendors that fulfill thousands of orders for dozens of other campaigns across the country.
We think the Team Fetterman online store is pretty unique (and it’s not just because we’re the only Senate campaign probably selling weed merch right now).
**Every single piece of John Fetterman for U.S. Senate campaign merch is printed by a small group of hardworking, union-proud screen printers at CommonWealth Press in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.**
Since you haven’t purchased any Team Fetterman campaign merch yet, here’s a behind-the-scenes tour of CommonWealth Press. [**_Or you can shop all our union-made campaign merch now._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20243?t=3&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)
**[Shop Now »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20243?t=4&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20243?t=5&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)
Established in 2002 in downtown Pittsburgh, CommonWealth Press is a custom print and design shop. They specialize in print production of soft goods, digital wall coverings, graphics, and more.
**A big reason why we’re working with CommonWealth Press to fulfill our campaign merch is because their team is _unionized_.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20243?t=6&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)
CommonWealth Press is a proud AFL/CIO member of The Printing, Publishing, and Media Workers Sector of the Communication Workers of America and the Graphic Communications Conference of the International Brotherhood of Teamsters.
Full-time employees receive — paid vacation, full health benefits, disability, paternity/maternity leave, matching retirement, and birthdays as a paid day off. _Union printed and union made. The union way of life._
[__](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20243?t=7&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)
On our merch, you’ll notice CommonWealth Press’s union label (sometimes called a union bug). Whether it’s a sticker, t-shirt, or tote bag, this little mark advertises that the employees who made it are represented by a recognized labor union and an overall healthy work environment.
[**_See for yourself, Peter! Snag your first-ever union-made and union-printed Team Fetterman merch today._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20243?t=9&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)
**[Shop Now »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20243?t=10&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)**
In unity,
Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Have you seen our brand-new Pride Merch?! [**_Get yours now so that it arrives before your local Pride Parade._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20243?t=11&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf) 🌈

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210612-1733-footer&t=12&refcode2=1733_434096_1Kdqbf&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=13&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1733%2E434096%2E1Kdqbf)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| | Hi Peter, John Fetterman is right: Joe Manchin must open his eyes to reality. Republicans in the Senate have a vested interest in eroding voting rights across the country. The simple truth is that the future of our democracy is at stake, and now is not the time to pretend that Republicans will turn over a new leaf and be interested in bipartisan compromise any time soon. But Joe Manchin isn't listening. He refuses to support the For The People Act \-- a bill he co-sponsored just two years ago \-- and he's refusing to take any action on the filibuster. While others continue to focus on persuading Manchin away from his position, we're preparing for the 2022 midterms. John Fetterman is running to replace retiring GOP Senator Pat Toomey, and Fetterman would give the Democrats a tremendous shot at EXPANDING our majority in the next Congress. Fetterman is a bold progressive who understands that Republicans are making a steady yet relentless march towards authoritarianism, and Fetterman is up for stopping them in their tracks. | **[FUND FETTERMAN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30697524/290340116/-2125726282?refcode=OUT_20210612_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjOTM2ZDJkLWFjY2ItZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RsANw6N9njY4V0nDSZCvI9ln73pE7hyRZ_wFjbwBVgE=)**

| GET OUT AND VOTE! ELECTION DAY - TUESDAY, JUNE 15 - STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 34
THIS TUESDAY, JUNE 15, is Election Day for the State House District 34 special election in Cobb County. If you have not voted already, make sure to get out and vote this Tuesday to send a conservative to the State House and show Stacey Abrams and her radical leftists that their failed policies are not welcome in Cobb County.
Polls are open from 7 a.m. - 7 p.m. -- Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rv7dVZlYQt3AdafqmvWlNwvV9E202ixPtCEngbi8OZt9sv-VsecGIBHWv83-4KfpwyImfbcZcvXCcUznXTbRzjpnArN3j47ZcG1zu2TWmfjFYkf7RMvRT_JoGk9729T9nXdyh9Hx6JE=&c=jpW-ChOMNT9OL75RkxLb1zvrTWf76qnzywna4lZjqnDjUwEX9h7fRg==&ch=KyYaZ8UVpumNHADRk99ZHM7qTA4qkfQ1JIJz8b2a8_pLG5kXhFbEUg==) to find your polling location.
---
| | |

| Greater Georgia has [spearheaded](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rv7dVZlYQt3AdafqmvWlNwvV9E202ixPtCEngbi8OZt9sv-VsecGIKMT-HWyOYdY2Eg1oLodO55BBFiLT1gv3ykAbfevjPZtw3FBPpltUGHlmOKGXFw_bgdiV7yMNzwHL5TphPk7o0gLCLGmKbxZA43ImMjzEvlDs02mLj53jHcmapMFYV4yof5Oj_gxrKtEl0cEXidQqisHPm6hWp5Mfl8ZrBzJZW5lU-_zU9v0zyx4Cj79aVuPjPXkAQWk4t3Ihi-vxyppt3_OFf4nk0W6NGzeq-jHh2gH&c=jpW-ChOMNT9OL75RkxLb1zvrTWf76qnzywna4lZjqnDjUwEX9h7fRg==&ch=KyYaZ8UVpumNHADRk99ZHM7qTA4qkfQ1JIJz8b2a8_pLG5kXhFbEUg==) grassroots efforts to get out the vote in District 34, including a voter registration campaign, door-knocking, text-messaging, phone-banking, and traditional mail.
Additionally, Greater Georgia launched a digital ad campaign underscoring the importance voting in this election by highlighting the Radical Left's misinformation campaign that cost Cobb County countless jobs and a $100-million opportunity. The ad also defends the American Dream and equal opportunity for all, and it stresses the need for strong conservative turnout to keep Georgia red.

| Greater Georgia is hosting many more events to keep people involved and active in the fight for a brighter future. Our Field Team is hosting a collaborative Volunteer Training Session in partnership with the Pike, Lamar, Upson, Meriwether, and Spalding County Republican Parties, where we will show you how you can help us bring unregistered voters into the fold and defend conservative values.
Dinner will be provided and will feature Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler.
The session will be Monday, July 26, at 6 p.m. at the Fellowship Baptist Church, 1165 Hannah's Mill Road, Thomaston, GA 30286\. "... 'President Trump's policies worked, that's what Americans appreciated ... We can grow the party. We can have more voices, but also understand that the vast majority of our party stands with President Trump and the policies that he promoted to put our country first.' ... Loeffler's new group, Greater Georgia, is seeking to build a voter mobilization infrastructure she said wasn't available during her 2020 campaign. 'I ran the largest statewide election that has ever been held in our state,' Loeffler said. 'I have a vast network and knowledge of this state and where our shortcomings are. I think we have to be very honest and candid about that.' ..."

ELECTION DAY - TUESDAY, JUNE 15 - STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 34 THIS TUESDAY, JUNE 15, is Election Day for the State House District 34 special election in Cobb County. If you have not voted already, make sure to get out and vote this Tuesday to send a conservative to the State House and show Stacey Abrams and her radical leftists that their failed policies are not welcome in Cobb County. Polls are open from 7 a.m. - 7 p.m. -- Click == to find your polling location. | | | | Greater Georgia has == grassroots efforts to get out the vote in District 34, including a voter registration campaign, door-knocking, text-messaging, phone-banking, and traditional mail. Additionally, Greater Georgia launched a digital ad campaign underscoring the importance voting in this election by highlighting the Radical Left's misinformation campaign that cost Cobb County countless jobs and a $100-million opportunity. The ad also defends the American Dream and equal opportunity for all, and it stresses the need for strong conservative turnout to keep Georgia red. Click == or below to view the ad: | == | Greater Georgia also hosted a Day of Action on June 5, where we trained volunteers and knocked doors to secure a conservative win. | == | == | == | == | To learn more about the special election for State House District 34, click ==. | | | | Greater Georgia is hosting many more events to keep people involved and active in the fight for a brighter future. Our Field Team is hosting a collaborative Volunteer Training Session in partnership with the Pike, Lamar, Upson, Meriwether, and Spalding County Republican Parties, where we will show you how you can help us bring unregistered voters into the fold and defend conservative values. Dinner will be provided and will feature Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. The session will be Monday, July 26, at 6 p.m. at the Fellowship Baptist Church, 1165 Hannah's Mill Road, Thomaston, GA 30286\. To attend, please RSVP by registering on our == by Monday, July 19 at 12 p.m. Click == to RSVP and to learn more. | | | | UPDATES: | GREATER GEORGIA ATTENDS GAGOP CONVENTION IN JEKYLL ISLAND Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler met with attendees and discussed Greater Georgia's mission. name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: I support Terry McAuliffe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
On Tuesday night, I threw my support and endorsement behind Terry McAuliffe for governor. We both want progress in the Commonwealth, and I'll be there to make sure it happens under his leadership.

I’m asking you to join me in support of and commitment to electing Terry. Let's do everything we have to do. Let's get in the trenches. Let's do the work because at the end of the day, we must win in November.

**[If you want to learn more about how to get involved or stay up to date, I urge you to sign up here for updates.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTGqUUvizGNcDfVwUp_3c-niUCdwZZZGc2GkTgVg-P3uSw3D05ZoWr56xxkCjH6uIVHg-yOIyBRcDZdw-PBms8sQJf0liG9FywdgRqggDPAPwrLPCItToCwLK14HO-Z3vqECtRxhttDRls3FI6dp9NKsiw56Ij_qeERcP3myR4JAI1TlqCXPVfKv1rjczKKnYTGr1eIlZVX-8jgNcpAL5hJnXqwkYP1gX8Em8rP0N4-BCr-wDE7AMozWcrooxD38_Wg/3cp/P0gkwKjkSfmNN2s_ZXJsMg/h0/gPNhmjEwz36Z7WK8FiSEmNNpTs7EHV860Bak9XyuCX8)**

Terry and Virginia Democrats are going up against a self-funding billionaire who will stop at nothing to buy the governor's seat for himself and destroy all the progress we've made. The only way we can beat that kind of money is by building the biggest grassroots army that Virginia has ever seen. **[If you want to donate to Terry and help him defeat Glenn Youngkin, you can do so here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOa0QYK9p0kSPzB5ovSxQWnk3fTTU3muerFZOMV5Iez8-hVyMgI-geijPXVS5JKd6XSjLIwv94QliDEeTJ1ZSK2WnS0fCKJBiVtJePJhh0ZpIHCCtWIIZNWLAY0Qm8yOhYEjirvShCkFdrtX2ojfp5CiRIv8NVF-nhNGHSjRHbjt3yg7LSzatPF12-uuzRXtZrf2G2Bx5nAr1SyLasclMijnFk5CfLT_HzCk6GFbo5MzLtotuZgbIJ0cbbYWheL3wLBz6Or6SCDidJfg0ubTNaKU/3cp/P0gkwKjkSfmNN2s_ZXJsMg/h1/--LyfbxzKNa2er5wUb7J-GX1_U9BHRt-_HKmVjC_RZk)**

I said this Tuesday and I want to say it again: I am going nowhere. I pledge to stay in this fight to uplift marginalized communities and people who need the help. I love our great Commonwealth, and I believe in the greatness of our state and our country.

I’m eager to get out on the campaign trail with you to elect Terry McAuliffe as our next governor.

Thanks,

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

| Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
---
Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
PO Box 2306
Arlington, VA 22202
United States
_

name: John Kennedy
subject: The Deceitful Dems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Time to investigate [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c126%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=UAgjhsbkSFUKB5S3HtY6Nw&sysid=1)
Time to investigate

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3134%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cfDlEh4GS%2fCLxrwjH9F%2fPA&sysid=1)
---
Friends,

Dr. Fauci needs to cut the crap.

Determining the origin of Coronavirus is the only thing that can help us prevent it from happening again.

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: Time to roll up our sleeves and keep going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
For years, we’ve been dedicated to taking Indiana to the next level. Now, everywhere I look, I see the results of our work –– and that tells me two... [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e62e90bfc6484e559cdd0296495eed07&_e=6ITc0XDZhaLxtw2K0WuGMo8MikQJVkgvxscIXPHRk1Td3z_Wqd5uvQxc3qBxqVpIog-G0BHfzIp5zjzEOUfid0rMdWdX083mJ5PDT3pPDxKeq4pEbegpwYcLdagZ55Tu4v3-pSyeC89Tk1nqpY968TIB2fuId4LPW_REAOqJdrCEvwiGnYppbOM9RlzGAclqRA4GDb2LSE4FqsBWNmreBkm2tqrxA7wOd9yQrX0ACDwtQ-Dfg_Kj4bNT7pEHgLniN8L_lyx1mb5_pZDjracoaw7Ha_m4JrnoFOjSgM-EbmdgUsNRa4dS87OeBjX16CyNI7dXkVDWbUj_TwFu5a2SpVffksWUls-1yaFtA6dp6RaTDyDegY3fIXT6p11eqMR4c40Ak676mtg1rnPwTcSXj_SzyBkcXFbe3JKBFVrosf5S-9qa85yGZnrhCRDSUaZLLlB7BpHyijROvTqbCUjmkMeLUGxutJCYe595iwRg99Q%3D) Friend, Over the past few weeks I’ve traveled all over the state to cut ribbons, meet Hoosiers, and break ground on new, exciting projects bringing incredible opportunities to Indiana. More and more businesses are choosing to call Indiana home, Hoosiers are on the move again with massive infrastructure projects being completed, and we’re invested in our future like never before. For years, we’ve been dedicated to taking Indiana to the next level. Now, everywhere I look, I see the results of our work –– and that tells me two things: **What we’re doing is working.** **We need to keep pressing forward.** Friend, as proud as I am of what I see unfolding across our great state, this is no time to kick our feet up and call it a job well done. _In fact, now is the time for the exact opposite._ **Now is the time to roll up our sleeves and keep building One Indiana for ALL.** We need to keep the momentum going strong, and we need all Hoosier hands on deck to make it happen. There’s not a single doubt in my mind that the sky's the limit for Indiana right now, and there’s no telling what we will accomplish next with your help. [**Friend, will you pitch in $5, $10, or any other amount to help take Indiana to the next level?**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e62e90bfc6484e559cdd0296495eed07&_e=6ITc0XDZhaLxtw2K0WuGMo8MikQJVkgvxscIXPHRk1Td3z_Wqd5uvQxc3qBxqVpIog-G0BHfzIp5zjzEOUfid0rMdWdX083mJ5PDT3pPDxKeq4pEbegpwYcLdagZ55Tu4v3-pSyeC89Tk1nqpY968TIB2fuId4LPW_REAOqJdrCEvwiGnYppbOM9RlzGAclqRA4GDb2LSE4FqsBWNmreBkm2tqrxA7wOd9yQrX0ACDwtQ-Dfg_Kj4bNT7pEHgLniN8L_lyx1mb5_pZDjracoaxuSVqpNrMM3Up509YPs73KvxBlBJQXO1ZclEHknaj0CXzKr0Yj3j0k_O2l2rsePjOhoG8DD_IJFq8gkCIKp_hoKY1C7tNqbaeoH4Vlk0UPt6X7_XbhU9K-InMDv6QwsoGOm4t31IjaT_g1nNEg9an9zHSu0YbnTwOiVEp4SN7lUtTil6WbEQ1womisLGgGO_lXMqOdbWETeVMZkIWiwiZc%3D)[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e62e90bfc6484e559cdd0296495eed07&_e=6ITc0XDZhaLxtw2K0WuGMo8MikQJVkgvxscIXPHRk1Td3z_Wqd5uvQxc3qBxqVpIog-G0BHfzIp5zjzEOUfid0rMdWdX083mJ5PDT3pPDxKeq4pEbegpwYcLdagZ55Tu4v3-pSyeC89Tk1nqpY968TIB2fuId4LPW_REAOqJdrCEvwiGnYppbOM9RlzGAclqRA4GDb2LSE4FqsBWNmreBkm2tqrxA7wOd9yQrX0ACDwtQ-Dfg_Kj4bNT7pEHgLniN8L_lyx1mb5_pZDjracoayNBEpNsNy-TH8cyxReje19k9m5cBY4NUoKlKJFdw5FTAHNYICu0r-s_Ymniis-mx1WSifQQOig8n8MWu4ty1xqb7yqpAOcpV9y54bLzShCmK2ntlJ9KUbWa9ToEJRH4caAgK3rbWXTPNHz6Av0t5li1_cxaIpW_YhyQjq93Uat9-PHhWmQKzMmpjTIYNvaztN_WD0XUF6bDdv6t5nTG71I%3D) [**Pitch In to Keep Indiana’s Momentum Going**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e62e90bfc6484e559cdd0296495eed07&_e=6ITc0XDZhaLxtw2K0WuGMo8MikQJVkgvxscIXPHRk1Td3z_Wqd5uvQxc3qBxqVpIog-G0BHfzIp5zjzEOUfid0rMdWdX083mJ5PDT3pPDxKeq4pEbegpwYcLdagZ55Tu4v3-pSyeC89Tk1nqpY968TIB2fuId4LPW_REAOqJdrCEvwiGnYppbOM9RlzGAclqRA4GDb2LSE4FqsBWNmreBkm2tqrxA7wOd9yQrX0ACDwtQ-Dfg_Kj4bNT7pEHgLniN8L_lyx1mb5_pZDjracoayBxUpCSWFfNbJu1WTMc41bm-kgBjyuoIBHKm4Vn9MceG1UEymRmWeKQs_TOmDT6S5V42giOfG81GfeurFo2JyEgbnMihnP3-j6kPrqPcYs93eO2OBEbNZ__egXr20q6NcEkgEt3gwwsXE1ASeBbWTnrYzXPFmiBL4g-7YUyv3TGQ1XVC_mbRKc8DaM8eq2R1MHfnGdMv4n4X85kJBw2C5s%3D) Thank you, Eric Holcomb |

| Dear Friend,
Our 2nd Quarter fundraising deadline is only 18 short days away. I need you to step up so we can continue in the fight.
So for the next 72 hours, my campaign has activated a 3x match on all contributions. So when you donate today, your contribution will have 3x the impact than on any other day!
Without your financial support this month, I can't fight the radical left agenda that is taking over our state and our country.
It takes courage to run for office, and that courage is what has gotten my campaign this far, but now the personal attacks are starting against me and our America First movement and I need you to do your part in this fight.
I can't win this battle alone, chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $700, $1,000, $1,450 or more today so we can Save America!

name: Nancy Mace
subject: guaranteed inflation headed your way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
You want to know how we ensure every single American pays more for every single thing they pay for? [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=978b7989b24749b79386f9834ece4a3e&_e=aj5n_W0SYb0ZyXFSOIe2CNsBXja6cA3U1eb-K86hHjOB2GsiGMDAi3s3YQKP8Zdn4YyUSmYS9uR-74V2C822zHZLvrDoY_OPEUf2gIGEPYhDVtABKN80dh5SxZkXTZh4hVtwYD3l6TGl0zb9QDnZx_wCTHe5emnrpX6HfRH9LkDnp8Pe28t17ceN1jKilxEmz38e6ns3y_qluok_FEmaqaXZqiRIaTN4Ld5mfgbNiCJqxbhW8m0RdvBY6-tKp4LjLdPDDH51RYHlLNpJaEbha56q_sbDvr675fOZBMmH5iPxqahnYlybBXPvdFYxEkiWVjwqJRKIS3EpihWGIrg39FgjtV8XMAFvu1R4CGwe3Bsu0BflKwIPQdBh3mbrWAQledmIuke9ZSpD2uKxESifb6RMBB9b3kWJ-yh7f_PhtQrwWUqVjOchpigTwa9tfMumEpTulSxCMD_smDcoldrbX5autRq_LL-NW3P5aCW9lF4%3D) Friend, You want to know how we ensure every single American pays more for every single thing they pay for? _Passing Joe Biden's Budget! _ By adding an extra 0 here, and another extra 0 there, Biden has racked up a $6 Trillion dollar bill that guarantees huge inflation for the whole nation. It's not just unnecessary, it's reckless. And it's about time we stand up to this runaway spending! name: The Mississippi Republican Party
subject: Biden called us what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:
Joe Biden called Governor Reeves, and all Mississippians who wanted to re-open our state’s economy "Neanderthals." | |
---
Dear Fellow Republican,
Joe Biden called Governor Reeves, and all Mississippians who wanted to re-open our state’s economy “Neanderthals.” Since then, new COVID cases in Mississippi significantly dropped compared to states like Michigan and New York, who continue strict mandates.

**As numbers continue to drop, it's more evident than ever that data doesn’t play politics, but Joe Biden does.**

body:

Your responses will help Kim prioritize what issues she and her House colleagues should focus on next as they continue their work in Congress. We're getting ready to share our priorities survey results with Kim and we noticed you haven't given your thoughts yet, Peter.

As a member of this grassroots team, your feedback is important to Kim. Your responses will help Kim prioritize what issues she and her House colleagues should focus on next as they continue their work in Congress.

**[Don't miss your chance to make your voice heard. From: Team Schrier
Subject: Kim wants to know what's on your mind
Date: Thursday, June 10, 2021
Team,

Since the start of the 117th session of Congress, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House have wasted no time addressing the issues most important to us. This year alone, they've passed legislation to strengthen our democracy, provide more COVID-19 relief, close gun sale loopholes, and _more_.

The House has already accomplished so much, and they're just getting started. From passing an infrastructure plan to protecting voting rights, we have a lot of work ahead of us.

As we approach the halfway point of 2021, Kim wants to hear about the issues that you would most like to see addressed. **[Take our mid-year priorities survey now and share with Kim which issues are most important to you>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30699840/290348711/1806545315?gpsid=8_30_19333&ms=em21_210611_survkkr_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_210611_survkkr_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210611_survkkr_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGM0MzBjMi1iOGNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvOfXr_O_p986xa88k3fdK5IsfOMgDJRtxrU92YYO1s=&emci=f0686b30-dbca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9dc430c2-b8cb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30699841/290348752/1806545315?gpsid=8_30_19333&ms=em21_210611_survkkr_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_210611_survkkr_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210611_survkkr_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGM0MzBjMi1iOGNiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvOfXr_O_p986xa88k3fdK5IsfOMgDJRtxrU92YYO1s=&emci=f0686b30-dbca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9dc430c2-b8cb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)

Kim knows how important it is to listen to the people she's been elected to serve and she wants everyone to have the chance to make their voices heard. The results of this survey will help Kim shape her priorities and better understand how to represent you in Congress.

clean_body: As a member of this grassroots team, your feedback is important to Kim. Your responses will help Kim prioritize what issues she and her House colleagues should focus on next as they continue their work in Congress. We're getting ready to share our priorities survey results with Kim and we noticed you haven't given your thoughts yet, Peter. As a member of this grassroots team, your feedback is important to Kim. Your responses will help Kim prioritize what issues she and her House colleagues should focus on next as they continue their work in Congress. \-----------Begin Forwarded Message----------- From: Team Schrier Subject: Kim wants to know what's on your mind Date: Thursday, June 10, 2021 Team, Since the start of the 117th session of Congress, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House have wasted no time addressing the issues most important to us. This year alone, they've passed legislation to strengthen our democracy, provide more COVID-19 relief, close gun sale loopholes, and more. The House has already accomplished so much, and they're just getting started. From passing an infrastructure plan to protecting voting rights, we have a lot of work ahead of us. As we approach the halfway point of 2021, Kim wants to hear about the issues that you would most like to see addressed. | Kim knows how important it is to listen to the people she's been elected to serve and she wants everyone to have the chance to make their voices heard. The results of this survey will help Kim shape her priorities and better understand how to represent you in Congress. We'll be handing the results of this survey over to Kim in just a few days, so don't miss your chance to share what's on your mind. Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Chip in today to help us stop any attempt at taking back this seat >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**_Breaking News:_ Two Republican candidates just announced they are running against Mark in 2022**
_Chip in right now to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate!_
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210612-1-15&t=1&refcode2=772_6688874__n7KPS&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS)**

* * *
Friends —
This isn’t how we thought the month would go, but we just learned that not one but TWO partisan politicians have announced they are running against Mark._
This brings the total number of Republican candidates running to defeat us to _three_ and is a sign of increasing National Republican interest in taking back this seat.
Right now, we need strong, independent leadership in the Senate to guide us through these challenging times — not someone who will put partisan priorities ahead of the needs of Arizonans.
**It is vital that we keep Mark in the Senate, especially right now, which is why we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you chip in $3 to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation to work in our efforts to hold this seat in 2022 and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?amount=3?refcode=em210612-1-15&t=2&refcode2=772_6688874__n7KPS&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210612-1-15&t=15&refcode2=772_6688874__n7KPS&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS)**
