****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210612-1-15&t=16&refcode2=772_6688874__n7KPS&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210612-1-15&t=17&refcode2=772_6688874__n7KPS&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210612-1-15&t=18&refcode2=772_6688874__n7KPS&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210612-1-15&t=19&refcode2=772_6688874__n7KPS&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210612-1-15&t=20&refcode2=772_6688874__n7KPS&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS)**
---
****
One of our biggest advantages is starting to lay the groundwork for our 2022 victory today — but that can only happen if folks like you show your support for Mark.
It only takes $1 to get involved in a people-powered campaign like ours, and when you do, you immediately become part of a team of individuals all coming together for a common purpose: _to keep Mark Kelly in the Senate where he can continue to fight for us and our families._
**So click the link below and chip in $3 if you can to help us put a down payment on keeping Mark in the Senate. If we all do our part we can stop any attempt to take back this seat.**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/Defend-This-Seat**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210612-1-15&t=21&refcode2=772_6688874__n7KPS&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS)
Thank you in advance for chipping in,
Emma Brown
Campaign Manager
Mark Kelly for Senate

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=22&akid=772%2E6688874%2E_n7KPS).

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: She said what she said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Did you see Pramila's email? She said what she said: Republicans have proven time and time again that they have no interest in doing anything that the people desperately need or want, _so why are we still trying to negotiate with them on our priorities?_ It's time to go big, bold, fast, and ALONE. It's time to deliver for the people.
[**Now more than ever, we need Pramila's bold and fearless leadership in Congress. Will you chip in $3 or more today toward our fight to end the filibuster and pass a transformational agenda for the people, no matter what?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210612?refcode=em20210612-368&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=368_420207_ZYlGOM&akid=368%2E420207%2EZYlGOM)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: Thu, Jun 10, 2021
Subject: No more negotiating. No more delays.
Peter, in a few moments, [**I am going to ask you to make a contribution toward our fight in Congress to go bigger, bolder, and faster so Democrats deliver for the people that delivered us the House, the Senate, and the White House.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210612?refcode=em20210612-368&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=368_420207_ZYlGOM&akid=368%2E420207%2EZYlGOM) But first, I wanted to explain why this work is so important.
On Tuesday, infrastructure talks between President Biden and a group of Republicans led by West Virginia Senator Shelley Moore Capito collapsed. I wish I could say I was surprised, but I'm not.
Earlier this spring, zero Republican senators voted for the American Rescue Plan — not even one. Five weeks ago, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell stated that 100% of his focus was stopping the Biden administration. Three weeks ago, the GOP delivered their first counteroffer on President Biden's sweeping and necessary infrastructure plan — _it was an embarrassing counter, just 10% of the President's total proposal._
And as I told Rachel Maddow earlier this week, it is once again very clear that Republicans do not want to come along. That is why I'm concerned that we're now negotiating with a _different_ group of Republican senators — hoping to magically get a deal that meets the scale of the crises we face. Look: we can wait another week, we can negotiate with another Republican senator or two — but the results won't be any different. **Republicans have no interest in doing anything that the people desperately need or want. Their only interest is obstructing our progress.**
President Biden's American Jobs Plan and American Families Plan — in addition to the critically necessary For the People Act — are overwhelmingly popular among voters across party lines, just like the American Rescue Plan was. The voters who turned out in massive numbers in the general election and Georgia runoff elections don't agree with Senator Joe Manchin on keeping the filibuster in place, or weakening our proposals in order to get the support of a senator from a Republican party that wants to stop us at every turn. **They just want us to go big, go bold, and go fast on the change we promised them. They want results — and we must deliver them. Full stop.**
[**If you agree with me that the president and Congressional Democrats should do what we did on the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package — _go it ALONE_ — in order to pass the For the People Act and the transformational infrastructure, jobs, and families plan, contribute $3 or more toward our fight to end the filibuster and pass critical pieces of legislation.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210612?refcode=em20210612-368&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=368_420207_ZYlGOM&akid=368%2E420207%2EZYlGOM)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210612?refcode=em20210612-368&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=368_420207_ZYlGOM&akid=368%2E420207%2EZYlGOM)**
No more negotiating. No more delays. Let's get this critical work done — _together._
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210612-368-footer&t=23&refcode2=368_420207_ZYlGOM&akid=368%2E420207%2EZYlGOM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=368%2E420207%2EZYlGOM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=368%2E420207%2EZYlGOM)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

The Radical Left is attempting to push some major policies through Congress, many of which are unsound and logically unfit to become law in our great nation. Whether it's nationalizing our elections, ending the 2nd Amendment, defunding the police, or instituting 'woke' indoctrination in our schools, we need to stop the absurdity and create common-sense policies that will help the American people.
Will you take two minutes to sign our petition to stop the Radical Left's agenda and let Kat know you're with her?

# [New Poll](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=6064bf4c5c&e=b8a6795190) Shows Cox In The Lead
Gavin Newsom’s unpopularity has hit an all-time high and we have the numbers to prove it. Californians have realized it’s time for a new leader and **John Cox is the right choice** for the Golden State. The John Cox for Governor campaign released [**new polling**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d1bbc84889&e=b8a6795190) on Thursday conducted by [**Erik Iverson of Moore Information Group**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=466153d4ed&e=b8a6795190). Moore Information is one of the nation’s leading polling firms and has done extensive research work in California and across the country.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8ae152e9e7&e=b8a6795190)
| [View the Report](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=60bb7e51a4&e=b8a6795190)

[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=0194d720d7&e=b8a6795190)
## We Need You More Than Ever
It will take grassroots donors like you to win this fight against Gavin Newsom. **We have the unique opportunity to fix this beautiful state** , but it will take a unified effort to raise the money needed to spread the word and get Californians to the voting booth.

## [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=097a9f0dc9&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.

name: David Schweikert
subject: Look at everything he's done
body:
Fellow American, The difference is clear. From the last administration to the current, so much has changed. ... _and NOT for the better_ ... President Trump and Joe Biden’s priorities for our great nation couldn’t be more different. In the last few months, President Biden’s administration has only: ❌ Increased our taxes ❌ Implemented devastating plans for families ❌ Tried to appease China instead of calling them out for spreading the coronavirus ❌ Pushed a socialist agenda ❌ Cancelled our nation’s culture And that’s just the tip of the iceberg. You and I both know we need to look at our past to guide our future in the right direction. And we were on the right track with the previous administration. Under President Trump’s administration: ✅ Our borders were secure ✅ The job market was strong ✅ We were close to achieving energy independence ✅ Our economy was thriving One thing is clear: Joe Biden has ZERO interest in putting the American people first. The Virginia Justice Democrats are very excited to congratulate our VAJD candidates who won on Tuesday! [We look forward to helping you win in November and for your continued fight for Justice: ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e7d248545e&e=76fc145c69)

We would like to thank all of our candidates who ran this cycle. Most importantly, we would like to thank Jennifer Carroll Foy for leading the charge statewide for the progressive movement. We're immensely proud of your historic campaign and all you have done!

Virginia Justice Democrats

name: =?utf-8?Q?True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update | 6.12.21
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f0cca6a04657/true-the-vote-weekly-update-7232937?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
---
| |
_"When you can't make them see the light, make them feel the heat."_
_- _Ronald Reagan
---
| June 12, 2021 Dear Friend, Just weeks after True the Vote's Dan Gelernter demonstrated that the debate over voting bills before congress was a classic bait-and-switch ploy, we see [his analysis](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2e2ba39d13&e=ad8cba7e98) being proved true in the news.

"Suppose S1 was designed to get a different bill passed, by making the other bill look moderate," Dan wrote. And that's the frame that was used for the "dissent" among Democrats. That's now the [exact frame being used](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=cd4a357cc7&e=ad8cba7e98) to bash Mitch McConnell as intransigent for his opposition to the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.

In this week's newsletter, Dan explains the few differences and many similarities between the two pieces of legislation, and why either would be a disaster for the country. That's why it is so important to bring "the heat."

We're continuing our work on every front here at True the Vote, with our expanded staff and new office humming. Your support and patriotism are what keep us, and America, moving toward what is right, and what is honest. Thank you for all you do, and stay tuned for a **major** project announcement coming soon. Ever onward -

---
|
---
| [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2729d0f1d5&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
## Eyes On | John Lewis Voting Rights Act
_by Dan Gelernter, True the Vote_ Exactly as True the Vote predicted, leading Washington Politicians are using S1 as a political straw man that allows them to pursue what they’ve always wanted—federal control over state election law—while still looking moderate.

The first politico to pull this play in public is Senator Joe Manchin of West Virginia, who argued in an op-ed on the 6th that S1 is too extreme to unite a country tired of partisan politics. What we need is something we can all get behind—like the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.

The pundits on TV and in the papers have been completely suckered, and some are wringing (or seeming to wring) their hands over what this means for vote reform in America. Don’t be fooled: Under the hood, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act is just as toxic as S1. It is extreme legislation that strips states of their control over their own election laws. The only way to make the John Lewis Voting Rights Act look moderate is to put it side by side with something _even more extreme_ —and that is what S1 is for.

The John Lewis Voting Rights Act would not be a victory for compromise. It would be a victory for election racketeering and nationwide vote fraud.

[**READ MORE.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=5915c1e392&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b7a4ec0ebd&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
|
---
|
# MUST READS
**Manchin's Mind On Election Bill Not Changed After Meeting With Civil Rights Leaders**
_From Washington Examiner _\- Joe Manchin said Tuesday that he hasn’t budged on his opposition to Democrats’ sweeping election overhaul bill following a “productive” meeting with civil rights leaders attempting to sway him. The West Virginia Democratic senator on Tuesday morning reportedly met with civil rights leaders who support voting rights and election reforms, including Al Sharpton, NAACP Legal Defense and Educational Fund President Sherrilyn Ifill, and Urban League President Marc Morial.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=dc91a93852&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Actress Jennifer Lawrence: ‘Radical’ GOP ‘Dismantling’ Rights to Vote**
_From Newsbusters_ \- Oscar-winning actress Jennifer Lawrence brought the drama on Thursday when a video of her promoting the Democrat Party’s brazen attempt to federalize state and local elections was dropped online. Her theatrical chops were on full display as she acted as if she’s non-partisan and that the “radical wing of the Republican Party” is “actively dismantling Americans’ rights to vote,” instead of what they’re really doing, which is protecting the integrity of elections.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=54db44a759&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Fixing the Electoral Count Act Is a Good Idea**
_From National Review _- Mona Charen argues at the Bulwark that Democrats should focus their energies away from the doomed H.R. 1 and the John Lewis Act, and push for revisions to the Electoral Count Act (ECA). Ed Kilgore in New York magazine makes a similar case for revising the ECA. Not all of Charen’s suggestions are well-considered, but the project of revising the ECA to head off potential problems in 2024 is worthwhile.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c9da5787df&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY WITH TRUE THE VOTE](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=447dc03e08&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
|
---
| [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=87ae074338&e=ad8cba7e98) **Check Us Out On Insta![](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=9d2e31fd96&e=ad8cba7e98)****@realtruethevote** [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=25cfb85925&e=ad8cba7e98)[ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=eb372f26c9&e=ad8cba7e98)[ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c238617e67&e=ad8cba7e98)[ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=cb1225c698&e=ad8cba7e98)[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b2382b83b2&e=ad8cba7e98) [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=bdc2501105&e=ad8cba7e98)

clean_body: | | | | | | | "When you can't make them see the light, make them feel the heat." - Ronald Reagan | June 12, 2021 Dear Friend, Just weeks after True the Vote's Dan Gelernter demonstrated that the debate over voting bills before congress was a classic bait-and-switch ploy, we see being proved true in the news. "Suppose S1 was designed to get a different bill passed, by making the other bill look moderate," Dan wrote. And that's the frame that was used for the "dissent" among Democrats. That's now the to bash Mitch McConnell as intransigent for his opposition to the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. In this week's newsletter, Dan explains the few differences and many similarities between the two pieces of legislation, and why either would be a disaster for the country. That's why it is so important to bring "the heat." We're continuing our work on every front here at True the Vote, with our expanded staff and new office humming. Your support and patriotism are what keep us, and America, moving toward what is right, and what is honest. Thank you for all you do, and stay tuned for a major project announcement coming soon. Ever onward - | | | | Eyes On | John Lewis Voting Rights Act by Dan Gelernter, True the Vote Exactly as True the Vote predicted, leading Washington Politicians are using S1 as a political straw man that allows them to pursue what they’ve always wanted—federal control over state election law—while still looking moderate. The first politico to pull this play in public is Senator Joe Manchin of West Virginia, who argued in an op-ed on the 6th that S1 is too extreme to unite a country tired of partisan politics. What we need is something we can all get behind—like the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. The pundits on TV and in the papers have been completely suckered, and some are wringing (or seeming to wring) their hands over what this means for vote reform in America. Don’t be fooled: Under the hood, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act is just as toxic as S1. It is extreme legislation that strips states of their control over their own election laws. The only way to make the John Lewis Voting Rights Act look moderate is to put it side by side with something even more extreme —and that is what S1 is for. The John Lewis Voting Rights Act would not be a victory for compromise. It would be a victory for election racketeering and nationwide vote fraud. | | | MUST READS Manchin's Mind On Election Bill Not Changed After Meeting With Civil Rights Leaders From Washington Examiner \- Joe Manchin said Tuesday that he hasn’t budged on his opposition to Democrats’ sweeping election overhaul bill following a “productive” meeting with civil rights leaders attempting to sway him. The West Virginia Democratic senator on Tuesday morning reportedly met with civil rights leaders who support voting rights and election reforms, including Al Sharpton, NAACP Legal Defense and Educational Fund President Sherrilyn Ifill, and Urban League President Marc Morial. Actress Jennifer Lawrence: ‘Radical’ GOP ‘Dismantling’ Rights to Vote From Newsbusters \- Oscar-winning actress Jennifer Lawrence brought the drama on Thursday when a video of her promoting the Democrat Party’s brazen attempt to federalize state and local elections was dropped online. Her theatrical chops were on full display as she acted as if she’s non-partisan and that the “radical wing of the Republican Party” is “actively dismantling Americans’ rights to vote,” instead of what they’re really doing, which is protecting the integrity of elections. Fixing the Electoral Count Act Is a Good Idea From National Review - Mona Charen argues at the Bulwark that Democrats should focus their energies away from the doomed H.R. 1 and the John Lewis Act, and push for revisions to the Electoral Count Act (ECA). Ed Kilgore in New York magazine makes a similar case for revising the ECA. Not all of Charen’s suggestions are well-considered, but the project of revising the ECA to head off potential problems in 2024 is worthwhile. | | | | Check Us Out On Insta@realtruethevote | | | | Copyright © 2021 True the Vote, All rights reserved.

We lost the Senate majority, and now we’re paying a HUGE price.

Democrats want to give the appearance they tried to negotiate...then when Republicans won’t succumb to outrageous demands, they pass life-altering legislation on party line votes.

Look...I need you to be honest – so, I’ll shoot straight with you: _We can talk about winning back the Senate next year – but talk isn’t going to flip the balance of power in the Senate. Only an overwhelming blitz across the map where Democrats are attempting to defend their 50 +1 margin in the Senate will move the needle_.

In short, we must expose them as the charlatans they are...and empower voters to get the boot of socialism off our backs. **BUT YOU MUST be a part** – _or we’re not going to win._ We were going through our records last week to determine how many Republicans supporters we can count on to help us in our drive to take back the Senate; when we came across your name your status is listed as inactive. **[Before 11:59PM, we need to know if (1) you’re still a conservative/Republican, and (2) that you’re committed to helping me, President Trump and all Senate Republicans win back the Majority.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8224349de4c24baabb721dd28796ced1&_e=LnE4V_7mDQNp3R5uUcmiA8gnl6tXyXTFjS9dFdQK8duy-ZOlvi6A9ucjF8va5gJvYdVwj9J5lfWmb9eyYpdW2CI3bZhpKryDSdZKcygXJMH31T0iVxsqnCqAd6vuhvwjQnNX0iqGOWSettdhlOE7_2V9lsb7nZvCNqVXBYOeZK1vGesKkmBpp4jTO9nGrkuH9Er-WowLGWP0vtYOGQg0eSjERIGg6BrcNtyT0-AvTQdoA9P-z11R3A17Hl6hWKbf4QyoWVV7ONH7uqmXFukcsYd4x3la2lR21VDveEM4YifjP4Jxs22IfrDE14xnEp3FWFV0XgwYWVdSAFYCqHI9dgvk9FNk0CYmyqL4FhEEfdOH0vyUaUML3u0UDLW3DVHRlqh34iiCr80EEg3X11m_gZ2FxFz3o9Spe8j4l0dnwrX8Nqo11ilzq_8MFW2GvMCZWzvnPRiBhHpV2kZ_s-d1YjRCwOV-UKumNSZNrjzYBmE%3D)**

Big tech is not our friend. Want proof?

This is just the start:
* **Twitter bans conservatives** : Democrats look the other way
**Inflation:** Democrats want to spend even more
* **Amazon, Google, Facebook and big tech shadow-banning conservatives** : Democrats breathe a sigh of relief.

There should be no doubt in your mind. We’re fighting an uphill battle. **_I need to know if I can count on you, Fellow American_**.

If you think what we’re going through right now is worrisome, imagine if Democrats actually gain seats in the Senate next year and don’t even have to pretend that they want bipartisanship.

**[Please, I need to hear back from you ASAP](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8224349de4c24baabb721dd28796ced1&_e=LnE4V_7mDQNp3R5uUcmiA8gnl6tXyXTFjS9dFdQK8duy-ZOlvi6A9ucjF8va5gJvYdVwj9J5lfWmb9eyYpdW2CI3bZhpKryDSdZKcygXJMH31T0iVxsqnCqAd6vuhvwjQnNX0iqGOWSettdhlOE7_2V9lsb7nZvCNqVXBYOeZK1vGesKkmBpp4jTO9nGrkuH9Er-WowLGWP0vtYOGQg0eSjERIGg6BrcNtyT0-AvTQdoA9P-z11R3A17Hl6hWKbf4QyoWVV7ONH7uqmXFukcsWiAlQsHhUF5quErcZ8tfYiI7tvyS8jfm_MsmWsx_hgKyZXRt3yb6CdUkPiXWnewh4aGPJQuJGaMZysEDRMnkS9jz4uCWm5i0wVBooOtmEqFmPvFp7vW-NbAN5NNlJUAQQXB7iK7aiUhXubr9z74CTWGI-mKKXjstvUWyr-3taJ1ZdQDtLvz3muXkXicoREtps8vD3GW7TlgtKV4M0gHEus%3D)**.

Senator Josh Hawley

clean_body: This survey will close at midnight tonight! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | 11:59 PM tonight | National Republicans and their special interest allies have been trying to DISMANTLE Social Security for years. \-- Trump tried to slash Social Security funding in his yearly budgets \-- The far-right wanted to weaken Social Security to pay for tax cuts for the rich \-- And they’re continuing to spread lies to destroy this critical program! Thanks for weighing in, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you.
